heading: View Flex Cluster Backup Snapshots
body:
**Atlas UI:**

Atlas UI

Atlas displays existing snapshots for a given cluster on the
Snapshots page. To view snapshots that Atlas has
already taken:

Alternatively, to view a list of all `M10+` clusters with
cloud backup enabled:

If you choose to retain backups from a cluster you
terminate, they remain accessible here under their source
cluster name until they expire or you delete them.

**Atlasapi:**

Atlas Administration API

The Atlas Administration API provides endpoints for retrieving one or all
snapshots from a given Flex cluster:

- [Return One Snapshot for One Flex Cluster](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupflexclusterbackupsnapshot)

- [Return All Snapshots for One Flex Cluster](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupflexclusterbackupsnapshots)

Additionally, Atlas displays existing Flex cluster snapshots
in the **All Daily Snapshots** table. From this table, you can
[Restore from a Scheduled or On-Demand Snapshot](restore-from-snapshot) or
[Restore from a Locally-Downloaded Snapshot](restore-from-local-file) your
existing snapshots.

> **Note:** The Atlas CLI does not support Flex cluster backup snapshots.
